sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72688" key="oi)/suon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἴσῠον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wickerwork,</tr_> dub.l.in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:29:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.11</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n72688.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν τοῖς οἰ.</foreign> in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the basket-markct,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0034.tlg001.perseus-grc1:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lycurg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
